objective: String together a safe set of nightly automations for AgentOps: GitHub proof, GitHub evidence brief, private local Dream compounding, private local RPI/evolve execution, structured PR digest, and host scheduling.
validation_commands: targeted BATS or shell tests for branch suffix, packet probes, digest rendering, stale cap, and tag fallback

tracker_health.reason: bd ready --json succeeded and four task beads were created under epic soc-b8jo

done_criteria: Local dry-run wrapper produces structured nightly digest without source mutation
Dream packet probes and stale escalation are persisted
At least one productive-cycle PR body can be generated from structured state
Host scheduler docs/templates explain safe local execution after GitHub Nightly settles

test_levels.rationale: Shell orchestration needs parse/lint, mocked command tests, temp-repo integration, and optional live dry-run validation.
